top_signals.title: IEA Sees Massive Oil Surplus In 2027 As Middle East Supply Returns
top_signals.summary: The global oil market could swing from one of the largest supply disruptions in history to a surplus of more than 5 million barrels per day next year if Middle East production and exports recover following the U.S.-Iran peace agreement, the International Energy Agency (IEA) said on Wednesday, as reported by Reuters. In its first outlook for 2027, the Paris-based agency forecast global oil supply growth of 8 million barrels per day, far outpacing projected demand growth of just 2 million bpd. The result would be a supply surplus of roughly 5 million…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump says US will not invest in $300bn fund for Iran
top_signals.summary: US president’s pushback on reports of provision in peace deal comes after fierce bipartisan backlash
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CEOs of Anthropic and Google DeepMind call for U.S.-led AI coalition in meeting at G7
top_signals.summary: Tech leaders and heads of state, including President Donald Trump, joined a meeting about AI standards at the G7 Summit.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: BHP to sell $1.5B Chile power lines in copper-first pivot
top_signals.summary: The transaction would include the transmission lines that feed power to  its Escondida, Spence and Cerro Colorado mines.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: First Phosphate lines up LOIs, offtake deals for Quebec projects at G7 Summit
top_signals.summary: The company has two projects in the Saguenay-Lac-St-Jean region.
